headline: These S&P500 stocks are moving in today's after hours session

headline: Rollins Inc. (NYSE:ROL) Slips After Q2 Earnings Miss Despite 99th Straight Revenue Growth Quarter
summary: Rollins reported Q2 2026 revenue of $1.079B and EPS of $0.32, missing analyst estimates and causing a 9.5% after-hours stock drop despite its 99th consecutive quarter of revenue growth.

headline: Rollins (NYSE:ROL) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q2 CY2026 Earnings, Stock Drops
summary: Pest control company Rollins (NYSE:ROL) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, but sales rose 7.9% year on year to $1.08 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.32 per share was 5.8% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: ROLLINS, INC. REPORTS SECOND QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS
